audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Show HN: Fognitix – AI browser with parallel autonomous agents on the browser. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 5: AiCompiler – a language where the LLM is the CPU.
